customBreakpoints: none — tailwind.config.js does not override the default screens config
actualUsage: The app shell (Shell.tsx) has no responsive collapse logic at any breakpoint — this is a desktop-only admin dashboard. The public-facing flow (PublicSubmitScreen, PublicBalanceScreen) is the one part of the app with genuine mobile-responsive CSS, isolated in its own CSS Module.
recommendation: Do not assume the internal app shell needs responsive behavior unless explicitly requested. If adding responsive rules to the public flow, follow PublicSubmitScreen.module.css's existing breakpoints rather than introducing new ones.
